CustomField.description:
The first question of a Survey. Uses a filtered lookup so if you choose the survey first you have a fighting chance to pick the question since it's impossible to pick due to the auto-number of it's name.
Eventually, this will be hidden from the user and instead we'll use flows/triggers to allow choosing the Survey instead of making them choose from the question field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Choose the survey first and then the question will filter to only show the first question of that survey
CustomField.label: Question

lookupFilter.errorMessage: Filtered to show only the first question of a Survey. Choose the Survey field first.
